title: Flow Chart Nodes
description: Represents a node in the flow chart with identity, type, label, and position.

props.name: type
props.description: Visual or semantic type of the node.

props.name: label
props.description: Human-readable label displayed for the node.

props.name: x
props.description: X coordinate of the node position.

props.name: y
props.description: Y coordinate of the node position.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Canonical TypeScript definition of the node type.

data.content: export interface AXFlowChartNodes { id: string; type: string; label: string; x: number; y: number; }
